title: Nan Magale Heroine
subTitle: A struggling filmmaker after his back to back flops finally finds a producer willing to fund his next movie. However, he has a condition that the director has to cast his daughter as the heroine.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

subTitle: A bus ferrying a motley of passengers gets hijacked en route to Hyderabad. Later, the police and passengers face multiple challenges to overcome the situation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva's anger flares when Shambuki and Diti insult Goddess Parvati for her infertility and reject her blessings. Will the Goddess be able to soothe the furious Lord's temper?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati joins Lord Shiva on a pilgrimage to Amarnath, seeking blessings for a child. However, their journey is threatened by Tarakasura's malevolent scheme, as he sends Rahu and Ketu to obstruct them.

title: Kirik Party
subTitle: Karna, a first-year engineering student, falls in love with Saanvi, a final-year pupil from his college. However, a tragic event changes his perception towards life and he mends his ways.

title: Ganga Yamuna
subTitle: Greed drives a married woman with children to force her husband into marrying a rich woman. As she enjoys her newfound wealth, she realises that her family find comfort in the company of the new wife.

subTitle: Jyothi, raised by a misogynist father, grows up to be a rebel and embarks on a crusade against those people who devalue women, making it her mission to empower the opressed.
